task: Find everything relevant to fixing the Lua VM source compiler architecture after the recursive-emit mistake. Ground the investigation in explicit_programming.md, LANGUAGE_REFERENCE.md, the current experiments/lua_interpreter_vm compiler files, tests, and the OOM evidence in this workflow context if visible. Gather first-order facts about where parser/compiler code recursively emits regions, where Lalin language/reference docs define emit vs function-call behavior, existing compiler products that can support an explicit parser stack or function-frame design, current tests/harnesses that trigger OOM, and the working-tree state that must be repaired. Do not run heavy tests or compile the full parser/compiler; use reading and grep only. Do not propose solutions; gather facts needed to plan a correct architectural repair.
